name: job-cold-prospect
description: Generate a speculative (cold-call) application pack from a company name or URL — no job offer required. Sibling skill to job-tailor; reuses the same master CV, fact base, DOCX generation, and history DB.
author: Eddie Gent

setup.instructions: Requires the job-application-tailor skill to be installed alongside — this skill imports its scripts and schemas. Place your master CV as MASTER_CV.docx in the resources/ folder.
